author: y4rr
content: ShadowLlm threshold sweep #545: characterized predictor curve, found bimodal logits at pw=1. Implemented asymmetric BCE (bce_with_logits_pos_weighted) + pos_weight knob in trainer. Retrained at pw=3.0: F1=0.6762, and shifted the F1/density curve favorably. SHIPPED OPERATING POINT: pw=3 + threshold=-2.5 gives 43% block density (57% savings), cos_sim=0.882, argmax matches dense. First non-trivial paging point that preserves top-1 token. 85 lib tests pass. Notes: results/SESSION_99_THRESHOLD_SWEEP.md
